title: Climate FieldView App Reviews: What Farmers Say on iOS & Android
description: Climate FieldView™ review snapshot 2026-07-12 - 74 reviews, average 2.20 of 5, 58% 1-star, tallied per store.
answer_first: Climate FieldView™ averages 2.20 of 5 across the 74 reviews in this July 12, 2026 window (App Store 2.44, Google Play 2.00); 19% are 5-star and 58% are 1-star. The first capture for this dataset was 2026-07-12 and holds 74 reviews as the comparison baseline. See the per-store, per-star breakdown in the table that follows.
facts: Across 74 reviews fetched 2026-07-12, the mean score is 2.20 of 5 (App Store 2.44, Google Play 2.00).
The 5-star share stands at 19% - 14 reviews of 74.
The 1-star share is 58%: 43 reviews out of 74.
The window draws on 1 country feed(s), led by US at 74 reviews.
updates is the leading complaint bucket: 5 of 49 low-rating reviews mention it.
Initial capture (2026-07-12) logs 74 reviews as the comparison baseline.

faq.q: Why is this average different from the store listing?
faq.a: Because it is computed only from the 74 most recent reviews captured 2026-07-12. Recent-window averages like this 2.20 of 5 move faster than lifetime store ratings and highlight what users say right now.

faq.q: What is the source of this rating breakdown?
faq.a: A single 2026-07-12 scrape of public store review feeds for Climate FieldView™: 74 reviews across 2 feed(s), each carrying its own star rating and date. The table simply counts them per star and store.

faq.q: How do the two stores compare?
faq.a: For the 2026-07-12 window: App Store 2.44, Google Play 2.00. Both figures come from the same 74-review capture, so they are directly comparable snapshots of current sentiment.

faq.q: How would I build this table for a different app?
faq.a: Run the source actor with your app's store identifiers; it emits the same normalized review records used here (74 in this window), ready to tally per star and store.
